nasb.text: Let his mind be changed from that of a man And let a beast’s mind be given to him, And let seven periods of time pass over him.

esv.text: Let his mind be changed from a man’s, and let a beast’s mind be given to him; and let seven periods of time pass over him.

cnv.text: 使他的心改變，不再是人的心， 給他一個獸心， 使他經過七年的時期。

ccb.text: 要改变他的人心，给他一个兽心，达七年之久。
